name: Ada Bojana Island Beach
description: Triangular river-delta island at the mouth of the Bojana River — 3 km of wide dark volcanic sand, shallow entry, with a bohemian undeveloped feel unlike anywhere else on the Montenegrin coast. A row of wooden stilt restaurants built over the river serves wild-caught fish (carp, sole, eel); this dinner is the main event.
communityNotes: "One of the most beautiful beaches I've ever seen — very wide and lasts for kilometres." FKK (nudist) section is clearly marked; outside it, clothing is optional and non-nudists are common everywhere. ⚠️ Mosquitoes in the delta evenings are genuinely severe — multiple sources say DEET is not optional. Windsurfing/kitesurfing on the sea-facing side; calm river side near restaurants.
bestTime: Day 11 (Jun 26) afternoon → overnight — arrive mid-afternoon after Ulcinj. Dinner at Misko or Barbana stilt restaurant is the highlight. Sleep on the island (FKK camp ~€22–25 for 4+tent+car). Day 12: leave 06:00 → pass Sveti Stefan viewpoint en route → arrive Kotor by 07:30–07:50.

name: Misko Stilt Restaurant (Ada Bojana)
description: Family-run stilt restaurant on the Bojana River since 1991, built on wooden pilings over the water. Wild-caught fresh fish (carp, sole, bream, eel) sourced directly from the river and Adriatic. Ranked #1 of 7 restaurants on Ada Bojana island, 485 TripAdvisor reviews (383 Excellent).
communityNotes: "You feel like on a boat — amazing view on the river." "Best Balkan restaurant for fish and seafood." Fish soup ~€6, fresh whole fish €15–30, beers included in meal estimates of ~€25–35pp. **Barbana** is the equally-praised alternative: candlelit, tables in trees, at the exact river mouth meeting the Adriatic — call it the more atmospheric of the two.
bestTime: Day 11 (Jun 26) dinner — 5-min walk from the FKK camp to the stilt houses on the river. Aim for 19:00. Book ahead in high season or just show up early; both Misko and Barbana are within 200m of each other. Bring mosquito spray.

name: FKK Auto Camp Ada Bojana
description: Basic campsite on the Ada Bojana island itself, open since 1973. Sandy beach access, dated facilities (functional but rough around the edges), and the unique location 5-min walk from the Misko/Barbana stilt restaurants. Nudism only mandatory inside the designated FKK zone; rest of island is clothing-optional and textile visitors are welcome.
communityNotes: Facilities described as 'old' and 'basic' in reviews — no drinking water at pitches, some muddy after rain. The point isn't the facilities, it's sleeping on the island itself. ⚠️ Mosquitoes are severely bad at dusk in the delta — every camping review specifically calls this out. DEET is essential. **Safari Beach Camp** (Ulcinj, 4km, Velika Plaža) is the better-facilities alternative at ~€30–40/4 but you're not on the island.
cost: ~€22–25 for 4 adults + tent + car (off-peak before Jul 5). High season: ~€25–27.
facilities: Showers (basic), toilets, sandy beach access. No drinking water at pitches.
bestTime: Day 11 night (Jun 26) — check in afternoon. Hard departure 06:00 Day 12 for Kotor fortress at 07:30. Bring DEET. Backup: Ulcinj apartment ~€40–50 for 4 if the group prefers no mosquitoes.
